title: Odyssey C.N.M. [Creations and More]
description: A little mod that adds a little bit of everything to your average experience within this cube game called "Minecraft"
body:
Have you felt like something is missing in your cubic Minecraft world? Well don't worry anymore! we have your solution! an unforgettable odyssey!

As someone very old once taught me... everything great comes from something smaller, and your adventure through this mod will not be the exception!

## **Gameplay Trailer:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4yloscuqXDU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## **How I start?**

Your odyssey through this mod start with the simplest thing, creating a new world or entering your world that you have already started. When you enter your world for the first time with the mod activated, you will be granted your first of many companies, J.U.A.N.

   > ![J.U.A.N. [Joint Unified Automation Nexus]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/612df3f817578fd96ef7b128380c0ae0c97808f9.png)

J.U.A.N. will help you in your odyssey by giving you information like:
- Info biomes:
  
  >    Ybrial Biome info:
  >   1. - Huge trees
  >   2. - New neutral mob
  >   3. - New mushroom

  >    Celaris Biome info:
  >   1. - Dead trees
  >   2. - New hostile mob
  >   3. - Rotten branches
  
- Mobs description:
  >   -  Big cat description:
  >   
  >        This cat measures 1.8 blocks tall, so it will be easy to see at medium distances and even more so with its quite striking purple color, and this big cat is commonly found on the plains.
  >   - Silvan description:
  >
  >        The Silvan measures 1.8 blocks tall, and their natural habitat is the ybrial biome, but be careful, don't bother them, otherwise they will all attack you until they get tired.
  >   - Giant radish descirption:
  > 
  >        The giant radish measures 2.5 blocks tall, they are totally peaceful and very friendly mobs, plus if you want a place to easily stand, these giant radishes will help you with that problem. and like big cats, these are also found on the plains.
  >   - Automata:
  >  
  >     The automata is 1 block tall, this mob could be one of your companies for your odyssey, its functionality is simple, it will help you with the storage of blocks/items with the help of the "D.A.T.A. Key" to access it.
  >   - C.A.N.D.Y. Bot:
  >
  >     The C.A.N.D.Y. Bot measures 1.2 blocks tall, this robot will help you on your odyssey by giving you support, both by talking to you and by giving you candys.
